suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update frontend validation guidance to reflect current repo reality: deterministic unit tests (e.g., Vitest) may exist and should be run alongside build/browser checks when present.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-analytics-stale-age-bucket added deterministic Vitest coverage while mission AGENTS still states no frontend test framework.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a fallback validation playbook for conversion-related UI flows when fixture data lacks required statuses (for example no Converted leads), including deterministic seeding/fixtures to verify close-state regressions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-case-drawer-close-after-conversion resolved the state bug, but review noted agent-browser verification constraints due to available local data distribution.

orchestratorOverrides.lintFailure: Known pre-existing repository issue documented in mission AGENTS.md (eslint binary/config absent). Treated as non-blocking validator noise for scrutiny synthesis.
